title: Simplify renewable energy page text and add a biofuels process diagram

requirements.summary: Simplify Hydropower & Tidal page paragraphs to a lower high school reading level without changing headings/structure or the existing diagram.
acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Hydropower & Tidal page reads at a lower high school level (simpler vocabulary, shorter sentences).
No headings (h1/h2/h3 titles) are changed.
The existing hydropower/tidal diagram component remains present and renders as before.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify only the explanatory paragraph text (including the lead paragraph) while preserving meaning; keep all existing headings and section structure unchanged; do not remove or alter the existing WaterTurbineGeneratorDiagram render.

requirements.summary: Simplify Wind Energy page paragraphs to a lower high school reading level without changing headings/structure or the existing diagram.
acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Wind Energy page reads at a lower high school level.
No headings are changed.
The existing wind turbine diagram remains present and renders as before.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify only the explanatory paragraph text (including the lead paragraph) while preserving meaning; keep all existing headings and section structure unchanged; do not remove or alter the existing WindTurbineDiagram render.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Geothermal Energy page reads at a lower high school reading level.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify only the explanatory paragraph text (including the lead paragraph) while preserving meaning; keep all existing headings and section structure unchanged; do not remove or alter the existing GeothermalDiagram render.

acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Biomass Energy page reads at a lower high school reading level.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify only the explanatory paragraph text (including the lead paragraph) while preserving meaning; keep all existing headings and section structure unchanged; do not remove or alter the existing BiomassProcessDiagram render.

requirements.summary: Simplify Biofuels page explanatory paragraphs to a lower high school reading level while preserving meaning and existing section structure.
acceptanceCriteria: All paragraph text on the Biofuels page reads at a lower high school reading level.
No headings are changed.
The Biofuels page still covers the same topics (what biofuels are, ethanol steps, biodiesel steps, and uses) with the same overall section structure.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify only the explanatory paragraph text (including the lead paragraph) while preserving meaning; keep all existing headings and section structure unchanged; ensure topic coverage remains the same.

requirements.summary: Create and render a new Biofuels process diagram component at the bottom of the Biofuels page using the existing diagram styling/accessibility pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: A new diagram component exists under frontend/src/components/diagrams/ (e.g., BiofuelsProcessDiagram.tsx) and uses the same overall styling pattern as the other diagrams (card-like wrapper, title, SVG with accessibility labels).
The Biofuels page renders the diagram at the bottom of the page (after the existing content sections), using the existing pattern: a `div` with `className="not-prose my-8"`.
The diagram includes accessible SVG labeling (role="img" and aria-labelledby with <title> and <desc>) similar to other diagrams.
The app builds successfully with the new component and import.

file_operations.description: Add a new SVG-based Biofuels process diagram component following the existing diagram components’ pattern (card-like wrapper, centered title, consistent color/stroke styling, and accessible SVG labeling with role="img" and aria-labelledby + <title>/<desc>).
Import and render the new BiofuelsProcessDiagram at the bottom of the page content (after the existing sections) inside a `div` using the existing diagram wrapper pattern: className="not-prose my-8".

requirements.summary: Simplify Sources page user-facing descriptive text while keeping all source titles and URLs exactly unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: The main intro paragraph and the 'About These Sources' paragraph read at a lower high school reading level.
The per-source descriptions (the `description` fields) are simplified while preserving meaning.
All source titles and URLs remain exactly the same strings as before.
Page layout/components and link behavior remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: Rewrite/simplify the header intro paragraph, each source item `description` string, and the 'About These Sources' paragraph to a lower high school level while preserving meaning; keep all `title` and `url` strings exactly unchanged; do not change layout, components, or link behavior.
